items.title: NVIDIA And Inflation Fears In This Week's Market Forecast
items.author: Gav Blaxberg
items.description: The market is heading into an eventful week, with NVIDIA set to report earnings on Wednesday. Investors will be closely watching the company's guidance and outlook, as concerns remain about the impact of China's DeepSeek language model on AI chip demand. Additionally, the release of the Fed's preferred inflation measure, Core PCE, on Thursday could keep rate-cut expectations in check if it shows an upward trend.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article suggests that investors will be closely watching NVIDIA's earnings report and guidance, as there are concerns about the impact of China's DeepSeek language model on AI chip demand. However, the overall sentiment is neutral, as the article does not indicate a clear positive or negative outlook for the company.
The article does not provide a specific sentiment for the SPDR S&P 500 ETF, but rather discusses the overall market performance and outlook, which is neutral.
The article does not provide a specific sentiment for the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF, but rather discusses the overall market performance and outlook, which is neutral.

items.title: Zelensky Says Ukraine Won't Trade Minerals For Debt, Seeks 'Win-Win' Deal With US
items.author: Stjepan Kalinic
items.description: Ukraine's President Zelensky remains focused on security guarantees as the country negotiates a deal with the US over its rare earth minerals. Zelensky is committed to a 'win-win' agreement and has disputed the financial claims made by the Trump administration.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article does not directly mention the iShares Europe ETF, but it discusses the broader economic and political implications of the US-Ukraine negotiations, which could impact European markets.
Similar to the iShares Europe ETF, the article does not directly mention the SPDR S&P 500 ETF, but the broader implications of the negotiations could have an impact on the US stock market.
